title: Career Goals 2026
content: Target: Senior Backend Engineer at a product company. Focus areas: system design, distributed systems, Go. Salary target: $180K+

title: Stripe Research
content: Stripe: $50B+ valuation, 8000 employees. Tech stack: Ruby, Go, Python. Culture: writing-heavy, high autonomy. Known for excellent developer experience.

title: System Design Study Notes
content: Topics to cover: Load balancers, Database sharding, Message queues, Caching strategies, CAP theorem, Consistent hashing

title: Interview Questions Bank
content: Behavioral: Tell me about a time you led a project. Technical: Design a payment processing system. Coding: LRU Cache, Graph BFS/DFS

title: Project: Vela Career Agent
content: Building an AI career agent for the Coral hackathon. Tech: Next.js, FastAPI, React Flow, Coral SQL. Deadline: May 31.

title: Skills Inventory
content: Strong: Python, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, React, FastAPI. Growing: Go, Rust, Kubernetes. Learning: System Design at scale.
